description: This pipeline extracts pairwise statistics between 3D ROIs, plots the measurements as a histogram, and saves the output. The main steps involve calculating pairwise statistics, plotting them, and saving.

27c84cbe-3bf9-4195-9a11-4fe511b77fb8.name: iji-export-image-v2
27c84cbe-3bf9-4195-9a11-4fe511b77fb8.description:
Exports incoming images into a non-JIPipe format (PNG, JPEG, BMP, AVI, TIFF). Please note support for input images depending on the file format:
  • PNG, JPEG, BMP: 2D images only
  • AVI: 2D or 3D images only
  • TIFF: All images supported


This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

52c87751-acf8-4733-bbdc-9ec022f69a14.name: plot-table:plot-histogram
52c87751-acf8-4733-bbdc-9ec022f69a14.description: Plots the incoming table(s). This node will create a JFreeChart Histogram plot.

1ab0c8e2-f7ad-4be7-aa01-fa041f7cab5f.name: io-interface
1ab0c8e2-f7ad-4be7-aa01-fa041f7cab5f.description: Passes its input to its output without changes.

34afbb27-ce2b-4b85-a3fb-2a755f2b58f6.name: plot-table:plot-histogram
34afbb27-ce2b-4b85-a3fb-2a755f2b58f6.description: Plots the incoming table(s). This node will create a JFreeChart Histogram plot.

d578d12f-8385-4dcf-b8fc-7b3b5d7b32cb.name: ij1-color-to-rgb
d578d12f-8385-4dcf-b8fc-7b3b5d7b32cb.description: Converts the incoming image to RGB. This applies the LUT if any is set. Compared to the image converter node, this operation renders the image into a representation equivalent to an image viewer, meaning that contrast settings are preserved.

981efe86-1d95-46da-b77e-f0bc8df5b387.name: ij3d-measure-pairwise-roi3d
981efe86-1d95-46da-b77e-f0bc8df5b387.description:
Extracts all pairwise statistics between the 3D ROI

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

9bf34e3c-8684-4f09-992f-372fc2cd7c78.name: export-data-by-parameter-v2
9bf34e3c-8684-4f09-992f-372fc2cd7c78.description: Exports the input data via JIPipe's standard exporter. The output is the directory that contains the generated file(s).
